title: Senior Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited:
Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital Advisory Limited!
